source_summary: Adjacent desk-wellness creator showing a 90-second lunch-break reset at a standing desk.
signal_summary: Roughly four times the creator's usual view baseline within 48 hours; saves skew high.

reusable_elements.hook: Your lunch break is long enough for this.
reusable_elements.thumbnail_or_first_frame: Standing at desk, hands on lower back, mid-stretch.
reusable_elements.structure_or_pacing: Hook, three moves at fifteen seconds each, single payoff line.
reusable_elements.format_notes: Vertical, natural office light, no music ducking under voice.
avoid_notes: No before/after body framing per Luna's boundaries.

limitations: Single-platform signal; visible metrics only, no retention data.
